subcodes.first_line: O Radiant Luminary of the Horizon of God's Love! Night and day, like unto the Fire of Sinai, blaze forth and burn away the veils that cloud all vision [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای نیر افق محبت الله شب و روز چون نار سیناء برافروز و پرده دیدها بسوز وقت
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @detachment in teaching the Cause
